content:
# White Box Model

**Summary**: A model whose internal logic is transparent and can be expressed as a clear mathematical equation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-al-abduljabbar|Al-AbdulJabbar, 2020]] aimed to convert 'black box' AI models into white box models by extracting weights and biases.

## Scientific Context

- [[2020-al-abduljabbar|Al-AbdulJabbar, 2020]] White box models are essential for practical implementation in field environments where software constraints exist.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2020-al-abduljabbar|Al-AbdulJabbar, 2020]] derived from the weights and biases of an optimized neural network.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Converting AI results into white-box equations allows for the prediction of ROP outside of specialized software environments. ([[2020-al-abduljabbar|Al-AbdulJabbar, 2020, p. 34]])
